scripts.package:firefox: rm -rf build/firefox && mkdir -p build/firefox/examples && cp -r manifest.json background.js lib content popup icons build/firefox/ && cp examples/nbrb_response.json build/firefox/examples/ && rm -f kufar-currencies-firefox.zip && cd build/firefox && zip -r ../../kufar-currencies-firefox.zip .
scripts.package:chrome: node scripts/build-chrome.mjs && rm -f kufar-currencies-chrome.zip && cd build/chrome && zip -r ../../kufar-currencies-chrome.zip . -x '*_metadata*'
scripts.build:firefox: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm test && npm run package:firefox
scripts.build:chrome: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm test && npm run package:chrome
scripts.build: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm test && npm run package:firefox && npm run package:chrome
